entry.title: hello
entry.content: Hello world! This is my first blog and I do not kown how to write it yet. ​ I feel sorry about it. But today is a meaningful date. ​ If you are reading this blog, I feel it an honor. Once-in-a-million. This is just miracle. #include <stdio.h> ​ void main () {printf(“hello world!”);} 创建脚注格式类似这样 ^RUNOOB。 带下划线文本 Wish we can company you from today on! [^from today on] [^from today on]: [hello | 轻流扇萤 (zywifeliuying.top) ](https://zywifeliuying.top/2024/02/19/Hello world!/#more) 好像有语法错误，脆皮学生忘记英语了
